new_claims.claim_text: Trump fired 3 generals in one day for refusing to put troops in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Highly speculative claim from low-trust source.

new_claims.claim_text: One of two US pilots downed over Iran has been rescued, per CBS.
new_claims.notes: Claim cites CBS, but from low-trust user. Needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Iranian Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) downed an American F-15 fighter jet on Qeshm Island.
new_claims.notes: Claim from low-trust source; video appears questionable (looks like a game clip).

new_claims.claim_text: JPMorgan published a countdown for continents running out of fuel amid a Strait of Hormuz blockade.
new_claims.notes: Claim is being widely misread as a real-time event rather than a projection based on tankers at sea, according to other users.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran has released footage of modern bunkers that are invisible and imperceptible.
new_claims.notes: Claim from low-trust source; footage shows a concrete structure in a desert.
